channel.title: Operations on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Operations on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Incident response for AI: Same fire, different fuel
item.description:
Microsoft published a blog post on incident response for AI, focusing on how existing IR practices still apply while AI-specific telemetry, tools, and skills are needed. It frames AI incidents as similar to traditional response work but with different signals and operational needs.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: devops+ai: AgentCore: Deployment, Operations, and Lessons Learned (4/4) 🔥
item.description:
The provided content is only a short teaser and does not include substantive release or changelog details. It appears to be a post about AgentCore deployment, operations, and lessons learned, but no具体 information is available from the excerpt.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure SRE Agent with new capabilities
item.description:
Azure SRE Agent is now generally available. The GA release adds new capabilities focused on incident diagnosis, automated response workflows, and improving uptime while reducing operational toil.

  • Source: Azure Updates
